creator: r.gruyters@yirdis.nl
text:
Small update, due to localization file(s) and sql updates

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /data3/Build/CVS/ports/www/py-prewikka/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.12
diff -u -r1.12 Makefile
--- Makefile	11 Apr 2007 20:11:58 -0000	1.12
+++ Makefile	22 May 2007 11:55:45 -0000
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	prewikka
-PORTVERSION=	0.9.10
+PORTVERSION=	0.9.11
 CATEGORIES=	www security python
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.prelude-ids.org/download/releases/ \
 		http://www.prelude-ids.org/download/releases/old/
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@
 COMMENT=	Frontend for the Prelude IDS
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	cheetah-compile:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-cheetah
-LIB_DEPENDS=	prelude.11:${PORTSDIR}/security/libprelude \
+LIB_DEPENDS=	prelude.12:${PORTSDIR}/security/libprelude \
 		preludedb.4:${PORTSDIR}/security/libpreludedb
 
 USE_PYTHON=		2.3+
